specDetail.description: File browser for navigating project directory structure. Feature is not yet implemented — currently shows only a placeholder heading.
parameters: Placeholder page with Files heading only
No file tree, navigation, or editing functionality implemented

constraints: Feature not yet implemented — displays placeholder only
No backend API for file operations exists

acceptanceCriteria.given: a user navigates to the files page
acceptanceCriteria.then: a Files heading is displayed as placeholder
